folksonomy.title: Folksonomiya dvigateli
folksonomy.subtitle: Kalitlar Explorer
folksonomy.description: Folksonomy foydalanuvchilarga mahsulotlarga maxsus teglar qo'shish imkonini beradi. Quyidagi barcha mavjud kalitlarni ko'rib chiqing, muayyan kalitlarni qidiring yoki undan foydalanadigan mahsulotlarni ko'rish uchun istalgan tugmani bosing.
folksonomy.progress_bar: Usage frequency indicator: {percent}% relative to other keys

key_visualization_guide.title: Key Visualization Guide:
key_visualization_guide.badge_products_end: shows the number of products using this key
key_visualization_guide.badge_values_end: shows the number of unique values for this key
key_visualization_guide.progress_bar: The progress bar represents how commonly the key is used relative to other keys

folksonomy.no_keys_available: No Folksonomy keys available. Keys will appear here once they are created.
folksonomy.no_keys_found: No keys found with the current search query.

home.intro_1: Open Food Facts Explorer Open Food Facts maʼlumotlar bazasini oʻrganish vositasidir.
home.intro_2: Ishni boshlash uchun yuqoridagi qidiruv satriga mahsulot kodini kiritishingiz yoki quyidagi mahsulotlardan birini bosishingiz mumkin.

preferences.title: Edit your preferences
preferences.subtitle: Your preferences are kept in your browser and never sent to Open Food Facts or anyone else.
preferences.classify_products: Classify products according to your preferences
preferences.classify_products_desc: Enable personalized product classification based on your preferences.
preferences.default_description: Nutri-Score, Green-Score and food processing level (NOVA)

folksonomy.intro_before: These properties are created and filled by users for any kind of usages. Feel free to add your own. The properties and values you create
folksonomy.link_properties: the list of properties already used by the community
folksonomy.link_docs: properties' documentation and its search engine
folksonomy.warning: Ma'lumotlar modeli o'zgartirilishi mumkinligini yodda tuting. O'zingizning xavf-xataringiz ostida foydalaning.
folksonomy.footer_after: . Don't hesitate to participate or give feedback.

datasources.title: Ma'lumotlar manbalari
datasources.incomplete_or_incorrect: Agar berilgan maʼlumotlar notoʻgʻri yoki xato boʻlsa, siz ularni ushbu sahifani tahrirlash oqali toʻldirishingiz yoki toʻgʻrilashingiz mumkin.
datasources.check_be_first: Be the first to check this product

info.images: Boshqalarga mahsulotni aniqlashga yordam berish uchun mahsulotning aniq tasvirlarini, ingredientlarni va oziqlanish faktlarini yuklang.
info.basic_info: Miqdori, qadoqlanishi va ishlab chiqaruvchisi kabi mahsulot haqida asosiy ma'lumotlarni ko'rsating.
info.origin_traceability: Provide origin and traceability information, such as manufacturing places, origins of ingredients, and traceability codes.
info.languages: Mahsulotni ko'proq foydalanuvchilar uchun ochiq qilish uchun turli tillarda mahsulot nomlari va tavsiflarini qo'shing.
info.ingredients: Mahsulotda mavjud bo'lgan barcha ingredientlarni sanab o'ting. Bu allergiya yoki dietani afzal ko'rgan foydalanuvchilarga yordam beradi.
info.nutrition: Paketda ko'rsatilganidek, 100 g / ml uchun ozuqaviy qiymatlarni kiriting. Bu foydalanuvchilarga mahsulotlarni solishtirishga yordam beradi.
info.moderator_tools: These tools are only available to moderators. They allow for administrative actions like correcting the product barcode.
info.prices: Help track this product's price history on Open Prices.
info.comment: Majburiy emas, oʻzgartirishlaringizni tavsiflash yoki qoʻshimcha kontekstni taqdim etish uchun izoh qoʻshing.
info.packaging: Describe each packaging component (bottle, cap, box, etc.) with its shape, material, and recycling instructions. You can add multiple components.

tooltips.serving_size: Bu qiymat har bir porsiya hajmi uchun har bir ozuqa moddasining mutanosib hisobini amalga oshirishga yordam beradi. Masalan, 60 g, 60 g yoki 60 G (birinchisini afzal ko'ring), 1000 ml yoki 1 L.
tooltips.ingredients_list: Asl tartibni saqlang. Belgilanganida foizni ko'rsating. Tarkibning tarkibiy qismlarini vergul yoki chiziqcha bilan ajratib, qavslardan foydalaning.
tooltips.categories: Faqat eng aniq toifani ko'rsating. Ota-onalar toifalari avtomatik ravishda qo'shiladi. Masalan, "Zaytun moyidagi sardalyalar", "Konsentratdan apelsin sharbati".
tooltips.product_name: Mahsulot nomi qadoqdagi asosiy nomdir. Bu ro'yxatga olingan savdo belgisi bo'lishi mumkin. Masalan, "Nesquik", "Pomidor ketchup". Nomga brendni kiritmang
tooltips.brand_name: Mahsulotning barcha markalarini kiriting. Old paketda odatda aniq ko'rsatilgan asosiy brend birinchi bo'lib kiritilishi kerak. Masalan, "Nutella", "Oreo, Mondelez"
tooltips.quantity: Mahsulotda ko'rsatilgan qiymatdan nusxa oling va birliklarni unutmang. Masalan, 230g, 6 (6 ta tuxum uchun), 3 x 150g (har biri 150 g dan 3 ta qutili mahsulot uchun).
tooltips.labels: Mahsulotning **faktik** va boshqa sohalardan farq qiladigan har qanday xarakteristikasi. Masalan, 'Nutri-Score, NOVA…', 'Belgiyada ishlab chiqarilgan, Bretaniyada ishlab chiqarilgan…', 'ISO 9001, ISO 22000…'.
tooltips.stores: Mahsulotni sotib olgan do'konni kiriting. Masalan, "Carrefour", "Walmart", "Lidl".
tooltips.origins: Paketda topishingiz mumkin bo'lgan har qanday kelib chiqish belgilarini qo'shing. To'g'ridan-to'g'ri ingredientlar ro'yxatida ko'rsatilgan kelib chiqishi haqida tashvishlanishingiz shart emas. Masalan, "Argentinadan mol go'shti", "Soya Evropa Ittifoqidan kelmaydi".
tooltips.traceability_code: Ushbu bo'limda siz qadoqlash belgilari, identifikatsiya belgilari yoki sog'liq belgilari bilan bog'liq kodlarni kiritishingiz mumkin.
tooltips.countries: Mahsulot keng tarqalgan mamlakatlar (xorijiy mahsulotlarga ixtisoslashgan do'konlarni hisobga olmaganda).
tooltips.product_type: Select the type of product: Food, Beauty, Pet Food, or Other.
tooltips.empty_fiber: Enter a hyphen (-) if the value is not present on the packaging.
tooltips.allergens: List the allergens present in the product (e.g. Milk, Gluten, Eggs).
tooltips.traces: List any traces of allergens that may be present due to cross-contamination (e.g. Nuts, Soy).

edit.nutrition_issues_description: We have detected some potential issues with the nutritional information you provided. Please review the following warnings and make any necessary corrections before saving your changes.
edit.name: Ism

packaging_component.quantity_per_unit_label: Quantity of product contained per unit
packaging_component.all_listed: All packaging components have been listed
packaging_component.number_of_units_desc: Mahsulot tarkibidagi bir xil shakl va materialdagi qadoqlash birliklari sonini kiriting.
packaging_component.shape_desc: Agar mavjud bo'lsa, qayta ishlash ko'rsatmalarida ko'rsatilgan shakl nomini kiriting yoki shaklni tanlang.
packaging_component.material_desc: Agar aniqlanishi mumkin bo'lsa, aniq materialni kiriting (uchburchak ichidagi material kodini ko'pincha qadoqlash qismlarida topish mumkin), yoki ishonchingiz komil bo'lmasa, umumiy materialni (masalan, plastik yoki metall) kiriting.
packaging_component.recycling_desc: Qayta ishlash bo'yicha ko'rsatmalarni faqat mahsulotda ko'rsatilgan bo'lsa kiriting.
packaging_component.weight_measured_desc: Remove any remaining food and wash and dry the packaging part before weighting. If possible, use a scale with 0.1g or 0.01g precision.
packaging_component.quantity_per_unit_desc: Sof og'irlik yoki sof hajmni kiriting va o'lchov birligini ko'rsating (masalan, g yoki ml).
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_desc: Write here the packaging information and/or the recycling instructions that are present on the product.
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_list: List all packaging parts separated by a comma or line feed, with their amount (e.g. 1 or 6) type (e.g. bottle, box, can), material (e.g. plastic, metal, aluminium) and if available their size (e.g. 33cl) and recycling instructions.
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_specificity: Try to be as specific as possible. For plastic, please indicate if it is opaque or transparent, colored, PET or PEHD.
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_combination: Data from this field will be combined with any data provided for each packaging part. It is possible to provide one or the other, or both.
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_examples: 1 plastic film to discard, 1 FSC carboard box to recycle, 6 1.5L transparent PET plastic bottles to recycle, 6 colored opaque plastic caps, 12 33cl aluminium cans
packaging_component.packaging_photo_desc: Photos of the packaging info and recycling instructions help to verify the data.
packaging_component.multiple_uploads_guidance: With Chrome, Firefox and Safari, you can select multiple pictures (product, ingredients, nutrition facts etc.) by clicking them while holding the Ctrl key pressed to add them all in one shot.

edit.origins: Origin of the product and/or its ingredients
edit.product_page_url: Link to the product page on the official site of the producer

missing_number.title: Serving size is missing a number
missing_number.desc: Serving size should include a numeric value. Examples: {examples}

missing_unit.title: Serving size is missing a unit
missing_unit.desc: Serving size should include a unit. Examples: {examples}

unknown_unit.title: Serving size unit may be incorrect
unknown_unit.desc: Serving size should include a common unit. Examples: {examples}

toast.save_error: Failed to save product. Please try again.

edit.legal_warning_title: Mualliflik huquqi bilan himoyalangan rasmlarni yuklamang
edit.legal_warning_photos_1: O'zingizga tegishli bo'lmagan yoki huquqlariga ega bo'lmagan fotosuratlarni yuklamang. Mualliflik huquqi bilan himoyalangan rasmlarni ruxsatsiz yuklash noqonuniy hisoblanadi va sizning hisobingiz to'xtatilishiga olib kelishi mumkin.
edit.legal_warning_photos_2: Faqat oʻz suratlaringizni yoki foydalanishga aniq ruxsatingiz bor suratlaringizni yuklang.

qr.barcode_scanned_not_found: Shtrix-kod {barcode} muvaffaqiyatli skanerdan oʻtkazildi, lekin bizning Open Food Facts, Open Beauty Facts, Open Products Facts yoki Open Pet Food Factsimizda hech qanday mahsulot topilmadi.

network.title: Ulanish xatosi
network.message: Open Food Facts serveriga ulanib bo‘lmadi. Internet aloqangizni tekshiring va qaytadan urinib ko'ring.
network.instructions: Muammo davom etsa, Open Food Facts Status sahifasiga tashrif buyuring.

facets.facet_website_description: Open Food Facts Explorer-da {facet} toifasini kashf eting.
facets.facet_value_website_description: Open Food Facts Explorer-da {value} toifasini kashf eting.

landing.title: Oziq-ovqat faktlari Explorer-ni oching
landing.subtitle: Dunyo bo'ylab oziq-ovqat mahsulotlarining hamkorlikdagi, bepul va ochiq ma'lumotlar bazasi. Hamma uchun oziq-ovqat shaffofligini kashf eting, qidiring va hissa qo'shing.
landing.explore_products_desc: Millionlab oziq-ovqat mahsulotlarini ko'rib chiqing, ovqatlanish faktlarini ko'ring va oqilona tanlov qiling.
landing.help_improve_desc: Help us improve Open Food Facts by editing or answering questions about these products.

dashboard.html_title: Foydalanuvchi profili - {user} - Food Facts Explorer-ni oching
dashboard.title: {user}foydalanuvchi profili

explore.title: Ochiq oziq-ovqat faktlarini o'rganing
explore.subtitle: Ommabop mahsulotlarni, mashhur toifalarni kashf eting va oziq-ovqat shaffofligiga hissa qo'shing!
explore.trending_products_desc: Ayni paytda qaysi mahsulotlar eng koʻp koʻrilayotgani va tahrir qilinayotganini koʻring.
explore.popular_categories_desc: Ma'lumotlar bazamizdagi eng mashhur oziq-ovqat toifalarini ko'rib chiqing.
explore.recently_added_desc: Jamiyat tomonidan qo'shilgan so'nggi mahsulotlarni tekshiring.
explore.contribute_now_desc: Mahsulotlarni qo‘shish yoki tahrirlash yoki savollarga javob berish orqali Open Food Facts-ni yaxshilashga yordam bering.
explore.random_product_desc: O'zingizni baxtli his qilyapsizmi? Bizning ma'lumotlar bazasidan tasodifiy mahsulotni kashf eting.
explore.learn_more_desc: Open Food Facts qanday ishlashini va qanday yordam berishingiz mumkinligini bilib oling.

compare.page_description: Compare nutritional information of food products
compare.share_text: Check out this product comparison I made!
compare.add_products_hint: Add products from their detail pages to start comparing nutritional values
compare.replace_comparison: This will replace your current comparison with {count, plural, =1 {1 product} other {# products}}. Continue?
compare.invalid_link_hint: This link doesn't contain any valid products to compare
compare.name: Ism
compare.hint_relative_first: 💡 Percentages show difference compared to the first product
compare.hint_relative_best: 💡 Percentages show difference compared to the best value (lower is better for most nutrients)
